items.title: Panthers will have joint practices with Jaguars, Texans this summer
items.summary: The Panthers will get a chance to work against a couple of other teams coming off of playoff appearances during training camp this summer.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Jake Lehmann notches first Hampshire ton to secure rain-affected draw
items.summary: Nottinghamshire kept at bay by unbeaten knock from experienced Australian batter
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Clarke's key questions for Scotland World Cup squad
items.summary: Steve Clarke names his Scotland squad for the World Cup on Tuesday and while the head coach has a largely settled group, BBC Sport Scotland takes a look at potential bolters.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
